sources.title: The AI in Supply Chain Report 2026: Market Data, Use Cases & What's Next
sources.claim: AI in Supply Chain market hit $19.8B in 2026 growing at 45.3% CAGR, nearly tripling since 2022; Gartner projects 60% of supply chain disruptions will be autonomously resolved without human intervention by 2031

sources.title: Loop raises $95M to build supply chain AI that predicts disruptions
sources.claim: Loop raised $95M led by Valor Equity Partners including 8VC, Founders Fund, Index Ventures, and J.P. Morgan Growth Equity (April 17, 2026) to build AI-powered supply chain disruption prediction and agentic auto-resolution

sources.publisher: Yahoo Finance / The Business Research Company
sources.title: Digital Supply Chain & Logistics Tech Research Report 2026: $146.92B Market by 2031
sources.claim: Digital Supply Chain and Logistics Tech Market at $72B in 2025, forecast to reach $146.92B by 2031; SAP, Oracle, Blue Yonder, DHL, and Schneider Electric are leading vendors

sources.title: AI in Supply Chain Market Size & Share Forecast Report 2030
sources.claim: AI in Supply Chain market to grow from $9.15B in 2024 to $40.53B by 2030 at 28.2% CAGR; demand planning and forecasting is the largest use-case segment

sources.title: Gather AI bags $40M in Series B funding to scale AI platform for global supply chains
sources.claim: Gather AI raised $40M Series B led by Smith Point Capital, bringing total funding to $74M for AI warehouse intelligence platform (February 2026)

sources.title: 2026 Supply Chain Checklist: How to Prepare for Tariffs, AI, and Geopolitical Uncertainty
sources.claim: 43% of US companies plan to shift supply chain footprint to North America within 3 years — up 25 percentage points from the prior year survey; AI and tariffs are the two dominant forces shaping supply chain strategy in 2026

sources.title: What to expect in 2026 — supply chain tech startup trends
sources.claim: Agentic AI acting as virtual team members is the most promising development; AI solutions now account for 50%+ of global supply chain venture funding flows; major logistics providers proving the agentic model at scale

sources.title: Six months in: Are tariffs really rebuilding American manufacturing?
sources.claim: US tariff imposition triggered nearshoring acceleration; 40% of US companies plan to relocate supply chains to North America by 2026 (Deloitte study); nearly 500K US manufacturing jobs remain unfilled due to digital and AI skills gaps

sources.title: AI, Tariffs, and the Great Supply Chain Escape Act
sources.claim: AI platforms applying NLP to supplier reliability and alternative sourcing; AI cuts supply chain costs 25-30% through route optimization and inventory forecasting; tariff-driven demand for AI sourcing intelligence up 300-500%

sources.title: AI in Supply Chain Market 2024-2031: $7.3B to $63.8B at 42.7% CAGR
sources.claim: AI in Supply Chain market to grow from $7.3B in 2024 to $63.8B by 2031 at 42.7% CAGR driven by increasing global trade complexity and AI-driven logistics transformation

sources.title: Supply Chain News Roundup: AI and Automation Will Change Disruption Management
sources.claim: AI assessments of disruptions became proactive in 2025-2026 via geopolitical NLP analysis, weather prediction models that reroute shipments, and compliance automation — representing a generational shift in disruption management

sources.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CS3D) — Directive 2024/1760
sources.claim: CS3D requires companies with 1,000+ employees or €450M+ turnover to identify, prevent, and mitigate human rights and environmental impacts across their supply chains — effective 2026 for the largest enterprises; creates mandatory AI-grade supply chain monitoring requirements

notes: Market size figures vary significantly across research firms ($7.3B–$19.8B for 2026) due to different definitions of 'AI in supply chain' vs. 'digital supply chain technology.' The $19.8B figure (AllAboutAI/45.3% CAGR) is used for the trend report as it aligns with the broader AI-powered planning, visibility, and procurement software category that enterprises are actively evaluating. Growth_3m (+22%) is an estimate based on tariff-shock demand acceleration and not directly sourced from a single report — marked accordingly in the trend data. All other figures have verified source URLs above.
